response.justification: Strong geospatial domain expertise and systems engineering background align well with pipeline data processing needs, but significant gap in recent modern C++ experience (last commercial C++ role 2014-2015) for a C++-primary position. Candidate demonstrates strong learning ability and versatility across tech stacks, but for a mid-senior role, direct recent C++ production experience would be critical to contribute effectively from the start.
strengths: Extensive geospatial/GIS domain expertise across multiple projects (Green Map Association, GISCollective, Tencent geo-data platform), directly aligned with routing tile requirements
Proven low-latency systems engineering: designed high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests/sec with real-time data processing and caching
Demonstrated versatility and willingness to learn across languages and domains; consistently expanded expertise throughout career including open-source contributions
concerns: Minimal recent modern C++ experience; last significant C++ role was National Instruments (2014-2015), over a decade ago
No Rust experience mentioned, despite being acceptable alternative for the role
No demonstrated experience with routing algorithms, navigation guidance systems, or the specific challenges of production routing data pipelines

key_factors.factor: Recent C++ expertise gap for C++-primary role
Distributed systems and real-time data infrastructure experience
